title: Russia Launches Deadly Strikes on Kyiv After Threatening Ukraine for a Week
summary_full: Moscow’s repeated warnings of a major strike, combined with the delay before it happened, seemed intended to inflict a psychological toll on the Ukrainian capital.
summary_public: Moscow’s repeated warnings of a major strike, combined with the delay before it happened, seemed intended to inflict a psychological toll on the Ukrainian capital.
